The question is asking to determine how many of Dino's singles reached the top 10 positions on the Billboard Hot 100 chart. Since each row represents a single's position on the chart, and the "position" column indicates the ranking, we need to filter the data to only include positions within the top 10 (positions 1-10). We can use the f_filter(position <= 10) operation to isolate the top 10 positions and then count the number of rows to answer the question.

The question is asking to determine how many of Dino's singles reached the top 10 on the Billboard Hot 100 chart. To find out, we need to sort the data based on the "position" column in the order of "small to large" using the f_sort_column(position) operation. This will allow us to see the singles that reached the top 10 positions (positions 1 through 10) on the Billboard Hot 100 chart.

The first single reached position 7 and the second single reached position 6 on the Billboard Hot 100 chart. Both positions are within the top 10. Therefore, 2 of Dino's singles reached the top 10 on the Billboard Hot 100.
